query:
SELECT l.id, l.livestreamDate, l.salesAmount, liv.name as liverName 
FROM livestreams l 
JOIN livers liv ON l.liverId = liv.id 
WHERE liv.email = 'shihomi208@gmail.com' 
ORDER BY l.livestreamDate DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
